Interface IMosaicLODInfos

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control mosaic LOD information.

[Guid("DFD25C61-79F5-4735-8CBC-1606947ACFDE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMosaicLODInfos
